creator: karpov@viva64.com
text:
It's high time to recheck FreeBSD project and to show that even in such serious and qualitative projects PVS-Studio easily finds errors. This time I decided to take a look at the analysis process in terms of detecting potential vulnerabilities: https://www.viva64.com/en/b/0496/

There is no point in fixing bugs, using this article. The article was meant to demonstrate the abilities of PVS-Studio. The best variant would be the analysis done by the developers themselves. We are ready to do this: provide a temporary license key and set up the analyzer.
